# HousePlus
Professional manufacturer of home appliances, solar systems & portable power stations for global wholesale buyers.

## Core Products
- Home Appliances (refrigerators, washing machines, kitchen appliances)
- Solar Systems & Portable Power Stations (300W–3000W)
- Small Appliances & LED Lighting (fans, water purifiers, energy-saving lights)

## Key Info
- MOQ: 100–500 pcs
- Lead Time: 20–35 days
- Payment: T/T, L/C, PayPal
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, ISO

## FAQ
Q: What's your MOQ?
A: 100 pcs for standard models.
Q: Can I get samples?
A: Yes, sample order is available.
Q: Do you support OEM?
A: Yes, full OEM & ODM.
Q: How long is the warranty?
A: 12–24 months.

## Contact
Website: https://www.houseplus-ch.com
Email: sales@houseplusgroup.com
